texto: Standing in front of the white picket fence, I stared at the multitude of champagne roses weaving their hunter green vines gracefully through and around the fence. Soft hints of pink hues whispered from the centers of the blooms. Their petals covered the lush ground and rolled in a lazy dance with the warm summer breeze...
explicacao: Citação de Leah Lozano sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Standing in front of the white picket fence, I stared at the multitude of champagne roses weaving…” articula reflexao, books, fantasy-fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como fantasy-fiction e fiction.
